# Dune (2021) — Reader demo transcript

Third-party film transcript (markdown export) from [Scraps from the Loft](https://scrapsfromtheloft.com/movies/dune-2021-transcript/); navigation links and page footer removed here. Not an official screenplay; film © respective rights holders.

---

Dune is an epic science fiction film directed by Denis Villeneuve, who co-wrote the screenplay with Jon Spaihts and Eric Roth. The film is based on the 1965 novel of the same name by Frank Herbert.
